meaning: n.(历法)息汪月(即犹太教历3月,犹太国历9月,在公历5、6月间,共30天)
examples: Sivan is the third month of the sacred festival year, and the ninth month of the modern Jewish Calendar year.
Swami sivan anda who had been a physician established an ashram and an organization called the divine life society near the sacred site of rishikesh in the Himalayas.
Prisons Authority spokeswoman Sivan Weizman said three prisoners and six guards were evacuated for medical treatment after inhaling tear gas.
Jaradat was not on hunger strike and died of an apparent heart attack, Israeli prison services spokeswoman Sivan Weizman said.
Prisons Authority spokeswoman Sivan Weizman said Abu Hamdiyeh was treated well by Israeli specialists and died in a hospital in Beersheba.
